content:
S-EPMC8650396 PMC8650396 The SEQC2 epigenomics quality control (EpiQC) study.

Background

Cytosine modifications in DNA such as 5-methylcytosine (5mC) underlie a broad range of developmental processes, maintain cellular lineage specification, and can define or stratify types of cancer
